name: Real-Life Docking Panel v2
description: 48 CASF complexes covering generic drug-like cases and interaction-specific stress tests. Generic cases (42%) provide baseline accuracy; specialized groups expose scoring method strengths and weaknesses for halogen bonds, aromatic stacking, metal coordination, ionic interactions, and large flexible ligands.

cases.title: Tiny neutral binder
cases.reason: Minimal ligand (10 heavy atoms). Baseline for smallest drug fragments.

cases.title: Small neutral heterocycle
cases.reason: Small heterocyclic ligand. Simple case where both scoring methods should succeed.

cases.title: Small polar binder
cases.reason: Small ligand with moderate polarity. Tests basic H-bond scoring.

cases.title: Small drug-like fragment
cases.reason: Fragment-sized ligand. Quick baseline for pose placement accuracy.

cases.title: Small low-affinity binder
cases.reason: Weak binder, tests whether scoring correctly ranks low-affinity poses.

cases.title: Small moderate-affinity binder
cases.reason: Small ligand with good affinity. Tests scoring discrimination.

cases.title: Medium neutral heterocycle
cases.reason: Standard-sized heterocyclic ligand. Representative drug-like case.

cases.title: Medium polar binder
cases.reason: Moderate-sized ligand with mixed H-bond donors/acceptors.

cases.title: Medium high-affinity binder
cases.reason: Strong binder at medium size. Tests whether high-affinity poses are ranked correctly.

cases.title: Medium potent inhibitor
cases.reason: High-affinity medium ligand. Good calibration point for scoring power.

cases.title: Medium aromatic binder
cases.reason: Moderately aromatic ligand in a standard pocket.

cases.title: Medium balanced binder
cases.reason: Well-balanced size and polarity. Standard drug-like case.

cases.title: Medium compact binder
cases.reason: Compact drug-like molecule with good affinity.

cases.title: Medium aromatic scaffold
cases.reason: Three-ring aromatic scaffold. Common medicinal chemistry motif.

cases.title: Medium strong binder
cases.reason: Strong affinity, medium size. Tests whether scoring reflects binding strength.

cases.title: Medium-large polar ligand
cases.reason: Slightly larger ligand with hydrogen-bond-rich binding.

cases.title: Larger drug-like ligand
cases.reason: Larger standard drug molecule. Tests search at moderate torsional complexity.

cases.title: Larger potent binder
cases.reason: 30-atom ligand with high affinity. Transition point to large ligands.

cases.title: Large high-affinity inhibitor
cases.reason: Large ligand with very high affinity (pKd 10.3). Scoring power stress test.

cases.title: Larger balanced ligand
cases.reason: 30-atom ligand with moderate affinity. Tests search vs scoring balance.

cases.title: Small Br-containing fragment
cases.reason: Small ligand with bromine. Tests whether halogen bond scoring activates for simple cases.

cases.title: Cl-aromatic binder
cases.reason: Chloro-aromatic ligand. Common medicinal chemistry motif with potential Cl...O halogen bond.

cases.title: Iodo-aromatic high-affinity binder
cases.reason: Iodine-containing ligand with strong affinity. I forms strongest halogen bonds (sigma-hole).

cases.title: Larger Cl-aromatic binder
cases.reason: Larger chloro-aromatic. Tests halogen bond scoring with more torsional complexity.

cases.title: Flat aromatic fragment
cases.reason: Compact tri-ring aromatic. Tests pi-pi stacking and CH-pi recognition.

cases.title: Medium tri-aromatic scaffold
cases.reason: Three aromatic rings. Tests aromatic interaction terms at medium size.

cases.title: Aromatic high-affinity binder
cases.reason: Tri-aromatic with strong affinity. Tests whether pi-stacking aids correct ranking.

cases.title: Quad-aromatic scaffold
cases.reason: Four aromatic rings. Stress test for pi-pi and amide-pi scoring.

cases.title: Quad-aromatic medium binder
cases.reason: Four-ring system at moderate affinity. Tests aromatic scoring discrimination.

cases.title: Large quad-aromatic ligand
cases.reason: Large ligand with four aromatic rings. Tests search + aromatic scoring at scale.

cases.title: Small Zn-pocket fragment
cases.reason: Tiny ligand in a Zn-containing site. Tests metal coordination for fragments.

cases.title: Compact bicyclic in Zn pocket
cases.reason: Small rigid ligand near Zn. Separates metal coordination from search issues.

cases.title: Medium Zn-coordinating ligand
cases.reason: Medium ligand with direct Zn coordination. Standard metalloprotein docking case.

cases.title: Mg-bound aromatic binder
cases.reason: Aromatic ligand with Mg coordination. Tests non-Zn metal handling.

cases.title: Mg-assisted larger pocket
cases.reason: Larger ligand in Mg-containing site. Tests metal scoring at higher torsional complexity.

cases.title: Ca-containing aromatic binder
cases.reason: Ca-dependent binding. Tests whether non-Zn/Mg metals are treated consistently.

cases.title: Small charged fused-ring
cases.reason: Small cationic ligand. Tests charge handling with minimal search complexity.

cases.title: Small charged amino acid analogue
cases.reason: Amino-acid-like charged ligand. Tests salt bridge and Coulomb at small scale.

cases.title: Amidine/guanidine binder
cases.reason: Guanidine-containing ligand. Tests cation-anion and salt bridge recognition.

cases.title: Peptidic charged ligand
cases.reason: Flexible charged peptide-like ligand. Tests electrostatics with high torsional freedom.

cases.title: Long dicationic binder
cases.reason: Highly charged flexible ligand. Stress test for electrostatic scoring and search.

cases.title: Charged aromatic medium ligand
cases.reason: Mixed charge + aromaticity. Tests whether charge terms interact correctly with pi terms.

cases.title: Large tri-aromatic ligand
cases.reason: 38-atom ligand. Tests GA exploration at high torsional complexity.

cases.title: Very large high-affinity inhibitor
cases.reason: 42-atom ligand with pKd 11.8. Tests whether search finds high-affinity poses for large molecules.

cases.title: Very large quad-aromatic ligand
cases.reason: 44-atom ligand with four aromatic rings. Search exhaustiveness stress test.

cases.title: Very large drug-like ligand
cases.reason: 45-atom standard drug. Tests runtime and convergence for large ligands.

cases.title: Bulky heteroatom-rich ligand
cases.reason: 48-atom ligand with extensive polar functionality. Large-ligand scoring test.

cases.title: Very large aromatic scaffold
cases.reason: 50-atom multi-ring ligand. Extreme search space test for GA convergence.
